app.name: AI Gateway
profile.title: AI Gateway
rag.empty: Upload a PDF or text file to ask questions about it.
rag.askPlaceholder: Ask a question about your uploaded documents.
chat.empty: No messages yet. Start the conversation.
compare.empty: Run a comparison to see responses.
selector.title: AI Judge
errors.ownKeyRateLimited: Your own key’s limits are used up — check your account with that provider. This is separate from your app request limit.
chatList.limitReached: Chat limit of {limit} reached. Delete a chat to create a new one.
chat.deleteConfirm: Delete this chat and its messages?
topbar.title: AI Gateway v1.0
topbar.subtitle: Multi-Model Response System
topbar.compareInfo: Your request is handled by three AI models in parallel; the judge ({model}) picks the best answer.
compare.title: All Model Responses
compare.fail.ownKeyRateLimited: Your own key’s limits are used up — check your account with that provider.
banner.fallbackUsed: Responses were evaluated by fallback script.
banner.reason.judgeUnavailable: The judge was unavailable (timeout, rate limit, or network).
banner.reason.invalidResponse: The judge returned an invalid response.
banner.reason.lowConfidence: The judge's confidence was below the threshold.
composer.autoRagNote: While you have documents, every answer is grounded in them automatically.
rag.acceptHint: Text documents only: PDF, TXT, MD.
rag.persistWarn: Heads up: an uploaded file is stored on the server and used in your answers until you remove it. Deleting it (✕) is permanent and cannot be undone.
rag.err.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Allowed: PDF, TXT, MD.
rag.err.noText: No readable text found in the document.
single.note: Single chat is not saved separately. You can't create a saved chat here; you can clear the history — messages disappear from the screen.
single.switchConfirm: If you switch the model, your messages will disappear and cannot be restored.
compare.threadEmpty: Ask your first question to start this chat.
author.name: Stanislav Byndas
author.tagline: A real, production-grade app built solo — from the backend and AI orchestration to the UI.
limit.title: Limited account
limit.intro: This account uses the app’s built-in free API keys, so requests are limited.
keys.title: Your API keys (BYOK)
keys.intro: Use your own provider keys instead of the app’s shared free keys. Keys stay in this browser tab only and are sent securely with each request.
keys.noteSecurity: Keys are never stored on our servers or in logs — they live only in this tab (sessionStorage) and are discarded after each request.
keys.noteFree: A model on your own key is not counted against your account limit.
keys.notePartial: Compare is unlimited only when every participant (the judge + all responders) is on your own key; otherwise it counts as one request. In Single, any model on your own key is always free.
keys.noteJudgeSingle: If you set your own model for the Judge, it’s also available in Single — running on your key with no limits.
keys.keyFailed: This key didn’t work — check the key, model ID and endpoint.
keys.singleConnected: Your model {model} is connected — no limits.
keys.compareLimitedNotice: Available with limits: not all participants are on your own keys. Add keys for the judge and all responders for unlimited Compare.
keys.compareUnlimited: All Compare participants are on your own keys — unlimited.
admin.title: Admin panel
